'''Reson Nath''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], operating during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was a member of [[House Paramexor]].

==Biography==
Some time during the war, [[Imperial Prefect]] [[Adar (Imperial)|Adar]] accused Nath of a variety of crimes and, after a [[Reson Nath v. Imperial Prefect Adar|trial]], she was to be punished according to Guild rules. The trial was overseen by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Gorliz]] and presided over by [[Janq Paramexor]]. On learning that the trial involved a battle with Nath, Adar quickly dropped the charges. However, Gorliz, who had bet on the outcome with Paramexor, ordered Adar to participate regardless.

{{Char-stub}}
